fail_case: absorption_rate >= 0.3 OR saturation == false OR any module < depth_min

comment.absorption_rate_max: 0.3 cap — prompt leaks through >=30% drills imply shortcut not breakthrough
comment.saturation_required: true — law must reach closure; open-ended drill = no breakthrough
comment.depth_min: 3 — DFS shallower than 3 levels cannot falsify deep structure
comment.module_coverage: 5/5 — all 5 lenses must participate; missing module = partial view
comment.diagonal_agreement_min: 0.8 — positive seed rephrased must agree >=80% or the signal is idiosyncratic
